about.heading: Waena means “center.”
about.intro: Waena means “center” in Hawaiian, and that is exactly what we offer — a peaceful, comfortable place in the heart of Maui.
body: Located in historic Wailuku Town, Waena Inn is a locally-owned boutique lodging created for travelers who want convenience, comfort, and genuine aloha.

We’re just 8 to 10 minutes from Kahului Airport (OGG), Maui Memorial Hospital, Wailuku Town, Iao Valley, business centers, and some of the island’s most meaningful cultural sites. Whether you are here to explore Maui, work remotely, serve as a traveling medical professional, or simply need a calm home base, Waena Inn provides a stay that is both easy and welcoming.

Our rooms are thoughtfully prepared with clean finishes, reliable Wi-Fi, self check-in, on-site free ample parking, and the small touches that make you feel taken care of. We believe in hospitality that is simple, sincere, and grounded in local values — respect, care, and community.

As a kamaʻāina-owned business, we are committed to supporting our local neighborhood and providing accommodations that are fair, comfortable, and connected to Maui’s spirit. We welcome respectful guests from around the world who appreciate staying in a space that honors place, culture, and people.
about.closing: Stay central. Stay comfortable. Stay with aloha.
highlights: Self check-in · Free parking · Fast Wi-Fi

testimonials.name: Sandra Osborne
testimonials.text: Can't give this place enough stars — comfortable bed, clean room, and good restaurants close by. This was our first stop, then again after trying to stay on the West side, which was more expensive and not nearly as clean or comfortable. You can't go wrong with this location. The 808 store across the street is cheap and friendly.

testimonials.name: Nruthya Kadam
testimonials.text: Cindy was incredibly responsive and helpful throughout our stay. She shared several restaurant recommendations, and the one we tried ended up being one of the best meals of our trip. The room itself was spotless — truly felt like a hotel — with plenty of space to relax. Overall, a fantastic stay!
testimonials.response: Thank you so much for the wonderful review! We're thrilled our team was responsive and helpful, and that a local-favorite restaurant became a trip highlight. We're glad the room felt spotless, spacious, and comfortable for your time in Maui — it was a pleasure hosting you, and we'd love to welcome you back!

testimonials.name: Dawna Davis
testimonials.text: Wonderful stay at this cozy second-floor studio in a fantastic Wailuku location. The unit has been beautifully redone and is thoughtfully furnished — ours had both a queen and a twin bed, making it comfortable and functional. The space was very clean, we felt safe throughout, and slept well. The mini studio kitchen was well equipped, check-in was seamless with keypad entry, and parking was easy and convenient.

testimonials.name: Jairo
testimonials.text: Beautiful place, very clean as described! Highly recommended — I will book again during my next visit.

testimonials.name: Yu Yan
testimonials.text: Great location. Host is so nice and recommended many local restaurants.
